text:
Created attachment 167595
git diff

# change

net/rubygem-bunny: update 2.2.2 to 2.3.0

Minor feature release, including:
- support worker threads aborting on exception
- explicitly close transports before recovering connection
- no TLS socket double-init
- lazily evaluate debug log strings

Full change log at https://github.com/ruby-amqp/bunny/blob/master/ChangeLog.md

# qa

- portlint OK
- testport OK poudriere amd64 10.2R
- unittest OK
